issues.title: Class name is not aligned with the doc
issues.body:
Please do a quick search on GitHub issues first, there might be already a duplicate issue for the one you are about to create.
If the bug is trivial, just go ahead and create the issue. Otherwise, please take a few moments and fill in the following sections:

**Bug description**
Refer https://docs.spring.io/spring-ai/reference/api/mcp/mcp-server-boot-starter-docs.html , 
relate MCP Server Boot Starters class name should be **Mcp**ServerAutoConfiguration, **Mcp**WebMvcServerAutoConfiguration  e.t.c
but actually the class name is **Mpc**ServerAutoConfiguration, **Mpc**WebMvcServerAutoConfiguration. this is a bit confusing

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/42ee954d-b819-494d-87ae-c914b6a8c570)

![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/2fd0375d-ce32-4c4f-a8c2-91e628dda30b)

**Environment**
N/A

**Steps to reproduce**
N/A

**Expected behavior**
class name should be align with Doc


**Minimal Complete Reproducible example**
N/A


cc @tzolov

comments.body: Hi @kioyong. This is addressed via 0719f440165c69a2bb4ef3a86e601e20da52a8f6. Thanks to @dev-jonghoonpark
